title: Gnaw Santa and snowman hot chocolate bomb - 4 hot chocolate melts of handcrafted santa and snowman with marshmallow toppers for hot chocolate gift set this christmas
features: 4 x festive Gnaw Hot Choc-mas Bombes - Hollow santa and snowman shaped milk chocolate filled with white marshmallows. Enjoy the delicious taste of our creamy flavoured hot chocolate balls. Melting hot chocolate bomb for your loved ones this christmas. Enjoy a delicious melting snowman hot chocolate.

Snowman hot chocolate bomb with santa hot chocolate bomb with marshmallow toppers. Enjoy our delicious hot cocoa recipes after a cosy family dinner. The perfect christmas gift idea for your loved ones as this can be enjoyed by kids, adults and family for christmas. Gift these gorgeous hot chocolate bombs to family and friends. Encased in chocolate and filled with mini marshmallows, simply stir into hot milk to serve.

Hot chocolate bomb with marshmallow and milk chocolate. Hot chocolate melts to make the perfect hot chocolate drink. Individual hot chocolate cased bombs. Suitable for all christmas gift purpose from Christmas hot chocolate set for kids.

The perfect instant hot chocolate to add to your hot chocolate station. Ideal festive hot chocolate treat and gift for everyone. Christmas hot chocolate gift for kids this christmas. Christmas eve box fillers kids, christmas eve box gifts and hot chocolate gift set christmas. Rich creamy, thick hot chocolate.

Enjoy a nice cosy evening when you place a bomb into a mug and slowly add hot milk to watch it melt and the marshmallows pop out. Stir them well, sit back, relax and enjoy this tasty festive hot chocolate treat.
description: Product description Gnaw Hot Choc - mas Bombes - 4 Festive Christmas milk hot chocolate bombes filled with white marshmallows. The squirrels love relaxing and feeling cosy with their paws up while enjoying a mug of dreamy, delicious hot chocolate with these fun and festive christmas hot chocolate bombs. To take yourself to hot chocolate heaven, simply pop a Santa or snowman hot chocolate bomb into a mug, slowly pour in some hot milk, and gently stir and watch the mini marshmallows come to the top. Then most of all enjoy :). Includes 2 snowmen and 2 Santa hot chocolate bombes Ingredients Marshmallows (glucose-fructose syrup, sugar, water, gelatine, dextrose, maize starch, flavouring), sugar, cocoa butter, whole milk powder, cocoa mass, emulsifier (soya lecithin), flavouring Directions Place a bomb into a mug and slowly add hot milk to watch it melt and the marshmallows pop out. Stir them well, sit back, relax and enjoy this tasty festive hot chocolate treat. See more
